show_create.admin:
CREATE TABLE `admin` (
  `admin_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `role_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '角色id',
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '登陆账号',
  `name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '姓名',
  `avatar` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '头像',
  `password` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '密码',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  `pwd_update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '密码修改时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`admin_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `username` (`username`,`delete_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=130 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='管理员表'
show_create.admin_role:
CREATE TABLE `admin_role` (
  `role_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '角色名称',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '角色别名',
  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `role_module` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模块权限',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`role_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `only` (`name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=12 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='管理员角色表'
show_create.app_apk_version:
CREATE TABLE `app_apk_version` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `version_name` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '名称/版本号',
  `contents` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '内容',
  `apk_size` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '安装包大小',
  `file_path` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '文件地址',
  `is_force` smallint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否强制更新',
  `version_code` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '内部版本号',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='app版本表'
show_create.app_article:
CREATE TABLE `app_article` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `cid` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '分类id',
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标题',
  `tag` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标签',
  `link` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '链接',
  `content` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '内容',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2停用',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '类型 1常见问题 2平台公共 3商户咨询管理 4消费指南 5帮助中心',

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=973 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='文章表'

  `trade_no` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '交易号',

  `trade_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '交易金额',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '订单金额',
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户支付金额',
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户退款金额',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1、订单完成 2、已创建 3、已支付 4、订单失败 5、已取消',
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `recharge_method` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '充值方式',
  `recharge_channel` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '充值渠道',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `order_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '下单时间',
  `create_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_goods_title` (`goods_title`),
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=504 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='食堂卡充值订单'

  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部订单号',
  `third_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方订单号',
  `trade_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '交易号',
  `flow_no` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单流水号',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '订单金额',
  `trade_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '交易金额',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1、订单完成 2、已创建 3、已支付 4、订单失败 5、已取消',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `order_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '下单时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户支付金额',
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户退款金额',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `pay_code` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'pos付款码',
  `settlement_type` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '结算方式 1.手续费类、2.折扣比例',
  `discount_rate` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '折扣率',
  `discount_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '折扣金额',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `shop_agent_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '下单门店id',
  `shop_agent_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '下单门店名称',
  `shop_brand_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户品牌id',
  `shop_brand_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户品牌名称',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人手机号码',
  `third_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '渠道 id',
  `third_type` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '渠道描述',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_paycode` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`,`pay_code`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_mid_time` (`mch_id`,`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_order_sn` (`order_sn`,`flow_no`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=151264 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='付款码分销订单表'

  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员号',
  `mbr_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员手机号码',
  `order_type` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '订单类型 1 卡券 2 组合卡券',
  `brand_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '卡券品牌id',
  `brand_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡券品牌名称',
  `coupon_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '卡券id',
  `coupon_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡券名称',
  `coupon_amount` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '卡券面值',
  `coupon_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '卡券单价',
  `icon` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '图标',
  `order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '系统内部订单号',
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部订单号',
  `third_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方订单号',
  `trade_no` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '交易号',
  `flow_no` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单流水号',
  `third_cashier_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方收银台地址',
  `num` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '数量',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '订单金额',
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户支付金额',
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户退款金额',
  `cost_one` decimal(12,3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000' COMMENT '成本单价',
  `cost_all` decimal(12,3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000' COMMENT '成本总价',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1、订单完成 2、已创建 3、已支付 4、订单失败 5、已取消',
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `notify_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '通知地址',
  `writeoff_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '核销地址',
  `result` mediumtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '卡管结果内容',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人手机号码',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_order_sn` (`order_sn`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_mid_time` (`mch_id`,`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_coupon_id_type_time` (`create_time`,`order_type`,`coupon_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_out_order_sn` (`out_order_sn`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_like` (`mch_id`,`mbr_number`,`mbr_phone`,`brand_id`,`brand_name`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_flow_no` (`flow_no`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1017016 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='大牌卡券订单表'

  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',

  PRIMARY KEY (`aid`),
  UNIQUE KEY `app_number` (`app_number`),
  KEY `idx_ai_status_type_module` (`status`,`app_type`,`app_module`),
  KEY `idx_app_type_level_status` (`app_type`,`level`,`status`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=50 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='应用表'
show_create.app_lottery:
CREATE TABLE `app_lottery` (
  `lottery_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `lottery_name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '转盘抽奖活动名称',
  `lottery_top_image` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '抽奖活动顶部图片',
  `player_num` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '参与人数（奖项在此人数内发完）',
  `start_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '开始时间',
  `end_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '结束时间',
  `lottery_intro` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '转盘抽奖活动规则',
  `create_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`lottery_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='转盘抽奖活动表'
show_create.app_lottery_prize:
CREATE TABLE `app_lottery_prize` (

  `prize_remark` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '奖项备注',
  `prize_num` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '奖项数量',
  `create_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',

  PRIMARY KEY (`prize_id`),
  KEY `idx_lottery_id` (`lottery_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='转盘抽奖奖项表'
show_create.app_lottery_result:

show_create.app_mall_component:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_component` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

show_create.app_mall_config_base:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_config_base` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户ID',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业子租户id 0表示是租户',
  `mst_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '模板ID',
  `title` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '组件名称',
  `content` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '标识ID',
  `open` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标识名称',
  `tel` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '是否使用',
  `is_cs` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启小程序客服 1开启 2关闭',
  `is_openjf` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否展示积分 1展示 2不展示',
  `tip` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '诈骗提示',
  `is_tip_index` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '首页是否展示诈骗提示 1是 2否',
  `is_tip_order` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '订单是否展示诈骗提示 1是 2否',
  `is_show_coupon` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '个人中心是否展示大牌卡券 1-是 2-否',
  `is_bind` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否绑卡按钮 1-是 2-否',
  `is_logout` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否退出按钮 1-是 2-否',
  `is_code` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否展示提货码 1-是 2-否',
  `is_user_code` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否显示user_code 替代手机号和昵称 1-是 2-否',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `is_show_voucher` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '个人中心是否展示权益 1-是 2-否',
  `is_show_exclusive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '个人中心是否展示节日活动 1-是 2-否',
  `is_show_fission_coupon` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '个人中心是否展示裂变券入口 1-是 2-否',
  `family_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '亲情号状态开关 【1.启用，2禁用】',
  `help_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '个人中心帮助状态开关 【1.启用，2禁用】',
  `is_show_third_top_nav` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否进入场景展示导航栏 1-是 2否',
  `third_top_nav_apps` varchar(1024) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]' COMMENT '展示导航栏的三方场景',
  `homepage_background_image` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '首页背景图',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mch_id_com_id` (`mch_id`,`com_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=378 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户权益商城基础配置表'
show_create.app_mall_config_diy:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_config_diy` (

  `template` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模板数据',
  `sort` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `searchtrue` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否开启搜索框',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户权益商城首页配置表'
show_create.app_mall_config_exclusive:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_config_exclusive` (

  `scope` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '活动范围类型 1-根据权益账户 2-全部员工 3-指定部门 4-指定分组 5-指定人员',
  `scope_item` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '活动范围',

  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',

  `out_mch_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '场景分站id',
  `detail_img` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '详情图片',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_name` (`name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=40 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='活动组件表'
show_create.app_mall_config_landing_page:

show_create.app_mall_config_login:

  `remark` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '是否使用',

  `background_image_h5` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '登录背景图h5',

show_create.app_mall_config_new_diy:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_config_new_diy` (

show_create.app_mall_config_tabbar:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_config_tabbar` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户ID',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业子租户id 0表示是租户',
  `type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '类型    router 路由    app  应用    coupon  卡券',
  `components` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '组件名称',
  `brand_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '-1' COMMENT '品牌id',
  `text` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标识ID',
  `iconPath` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标识名称',
  `no_iconPath` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '未选中标识',
  `pagePath` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '是否使用',
  `color` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '组件图标',
  `sort` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4891 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户权益商城tabbar配置表'
show_create.app_mall_info:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_info` (
  `ms_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mst_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '模版id',
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业子租户id 0表示是租户',
  `template_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模板编号',
  `template_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模版名称',
  `is_default` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '1 、默认   2、不是默认',
  `component` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '组件列表',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`ms_id`),
  KEY `idx_mst_id` (`mst_id`),
  KEY `idx_delete_time` (`delete_time`),
  KEY `idx_is_default` (`is_default`),
  KEY `idx_mch_id` (`mch_id`,`com_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=297 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户权益商城模版表'
show_create.app_mall_template:
CREATE TABLE `app_mall_template` (
  `mst_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `template_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模板编号',
  `template_type` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模版标签',
  `template_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模版名称',
  `template_cover` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模版封面',
  `template_is_default` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否是默认模板   1、默认  2、非默认',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mst_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户权益商城模版库表'
show_create.app_merge_pay_order:
CREATE TABLE `app_merge_pay_order` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `order_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单类型',
  `order_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '应用订单id',
  `pay_type` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1余额支付 2微信支付 还有mba_id支付类型',
  `order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '系统内部订单号',
  `out_trade_no` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方订单号',
  `pay_amount` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '支付金额',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1已支付 2待付款 3已取消 4部分退款 5全额退款',
  `pay_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `card_id` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '卡池ID',
  `card_no` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡号',
  `black_order_no` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '黑金流水号',
  `refund_amount` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `extra` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '扩展参数字段json',
  `activity_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci GENERATED ALWAYS AS (if(json_valid(`extra`),json_unquote(json_extract(`extra`,_utf8mb4'$.activity_id')),_utf8mb4'')) STORED COMMENT '活动id',
  `sync_time` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci GENERATED ALWAYS AS (if(json_valid(`extra`),json_unquote(json_extract(`extra`,_utf8mb4'$.sync_time')),_utf8mb4'')) VIRTUAL COMMENT '同步状态时间',
  `mv_id` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '积分券ID',
  `voucher_sn` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '积分券号',
  `sign_code` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '签约号',
  `group_code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业标识',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_pay_type` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`,`order_type`,`order_id`,`pay_type`,`mv_id`),
  KEY `idx_activity_id` (`activity_id`),
  KEY `idx_order_id` (`order_id`,`order_sn`),
  KEY `idx_group_code` (`group_code`),
  KEY `idx_sign_code` (`sign_code`),
  KEY `idx_out_trade_no_order_status` (`out_trade_no`,`order_status`),
  KEY `idx_order_sn` (`order_sn`,`order_type`,`pay_type`,`order_status`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_covering` (`mch_id`,`com_id`,`order_type`,`pay_time`,`create_time`) USING BTREE

  `brokerage_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '佣金发放状态 1、待发放 2、可发放 、3、发放中 4、已发放',

show_create.app_pick_order:

  `num` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '发券数量',
  `order_sn` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单号',
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡管订单号',

  `holder_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '卡包状态 1已兑换 2未兑换',
  `exchange_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '兑换地址',
  `price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '卡券单价',

  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `settle_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算价总金额',
  `settle_price_d` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算单价',

  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

show_create.app_product:

show_create.app_qmfx_order:
CREATE TABLE `app_qmfx_order` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员号',
  `mbr_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员手机号码',
  `result_page_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '支付结果跳转页',
  `detail_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单详情页',
  `order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '系统内部订单号',
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部订单号',
  `third_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方订单号',
  `trade_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '交易号',
  `flow_no` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单流水号',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '订单金额',
  `trade_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '交易金额',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1、订单完成 2、已创建 3、已支付 4、订单失败 5、已取消',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `order_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '下单时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户支付金额',
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户退款金额',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人手机号码',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_where` (`mch_id`,`mch_name`,`mbr_id`,`mbr_number`,`mbr_phone`,`order_sn`,`out_order_sn`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`refund_status`,`trade_no`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_order_sn` (`order_sn`,`flow_no`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=46 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='清美分销订单表'

  `brokerage_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '佣金发放状态 1、待发放 2、可发放 、3、发放中 4、已发放',

show_create.app_qmfx_refund_order:

  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',

  `writeoff_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '核销地址',
  `result` mediumtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '卡管结果内容',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `create_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人手机号码',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_mid_time` (`mch_id`,`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5627 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

show_create.app_shop:
CREATE TABLE `app_shop` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `third_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `brand_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户品牌id',
  `brand_name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户品牌',
  `group_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户分组id',
  `group_name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户分组',
  `type_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '门店类型id',
  `type_name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '门店类型',
  `cate_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户分类id',
  `cate_name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户分类',
  `province_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '省id',
  `area_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '区域id',
  `city_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '市id',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '名称',
  `no` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '门店编号',
  `lat` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '纬度',
  `lng` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '经度',
  `address` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '地址',
  `tel` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '电话',
  `special_logo` varchar(225) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '特约商户LOGO',
  `special_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '联盟商户类别',
  `show_special` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '是否显示在特约商户[Y/N]',
  `show_pick` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '是否显示在扫码提货[Y/N]',
  `is_th_open` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '是否开启提货券支付[Y/N]',
  `is_th_shop` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '是否提货券商户[Y/N]',
  `pay_code` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '福鲤圈动态码支付开关[Y/N]',
  `dynamic_voucher_switch` char(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y' COMMENT '福鲤圈动态码提货券开关[Y/N]',
  `status` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态[1 开启，2.关闭]',
  `create_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_shop_group_id` (`group_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_city_id` (`city_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_brand_id` (`brand_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_area_id` (`area_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_cate_id` (`cate_id`),
  KEY `id` (`id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_create_time` (`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_shop_name` (`name`(191)),
  KEY `idx_shop_type_id` (`type_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_province_id` (`province_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_filter` (`status`,`is_th_open`,`is_th_shop`,`show_pick`,`dynamic_voucher_switch`,`pay_code`,`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='门店列表'

  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员号',
  `mbr_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员手机号码',
  `detail_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单详情页',
  `order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '系统内部订单号',
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部订单号',
  `third_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方订单号',
  `trade_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '交易号',
  `flow_no` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单流水号',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '订单金额',
  `trade_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '交易金额',
  `channel_rate` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费率',
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道费',
  `rate` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费费率',
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费',
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '上游成本价',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '订单状态 1、订单完成 2、已创建 3、已支付 4、订单失败 5、已取消',
  `pay_money` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '实付金额',
  `commission` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金金额',
  `pay_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '支付时间',
  `exp_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间',
  `refund_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '退款金额',
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '退款状态 1未退款 2已退款 3部分退款',
  `refund_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最后退款时间',
  `order_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '下单时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `c_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'c端用户支付价值',
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户支付金额',
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户退款金额',
  `pay_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算费率（佣金比率）',
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '结算金额（佣金）',
  `operation_mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `operation_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人手机号码',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_update_time` (`update_time`),
  KEY `idx_order_status_time` (`mch_id`,`order_status`,`create_time`,`id`,`total_fee`,`mbr_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=236 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='物美分销订单表'

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=53 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='企业账户表'
show_create.com_account_role:
CREATE TABLE `com_account_role` (

  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT '企业id',
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '角色名称',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '角色别名',
  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `role_module` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模块权限',
  `level` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '级别 0管理员 1子账户',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`role_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=56 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='企业账户权限表'
show_create.com_member_group:
CREATE TABLE `com_member_group` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `group_ids` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '充值总额',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=42 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='企业会员分组'
show_create.commission:
CREATE TABLE `commission` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `commission_no` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模板编号',
  `name` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模板名称',
  `coupon` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '卡券佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `ddfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '叮咚分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `hffx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '话费分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `moviefx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '电影分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `mtfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '美团分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `smfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '山姆分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `stfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '视听分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `supplyfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '供应链分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `tyfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '团油分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `yhfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '永辉分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `hlfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '海旅分销佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `zfbhb` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '支付宝红包佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `shihangfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '食行生鲜佣金比例 1为1%',
  `flgfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '福利购佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `xcyfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '祥采云佣金比例 % 1为1%',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='佣金模板表'
show_create.commission_coupon:
CREATE TABLE `commission_coupon` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tpl_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '所属模板id',
  `coupon_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '卡管卡券id',
  `commission` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '佣金比例% 1为1%',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='佣金模板卡券配置表'
show_create.mch:
CREATE TABLE `mch` (
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bind_ma_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '绑定管理账户id',
  `mg_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户分组id',
  `partner_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '绑定合伙人id',
  `openid` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mch_number` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户号',
  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',
  `contact` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '联系人',
  `phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '手机号码',
  `pay_pwd` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '支付密码',
  `company` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业简称',
  `company_legal` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业法人',
  `company_info` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业简介',
  `address` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业地址',
  `salesman` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '我方业务员',
  `is_open_reg` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开放注册 1是 2否',
  `is_open_api_reg` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否开放API注册 1是 2否',
  `is_auto_audit` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启自动审核',
  `is_sms_czqr` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启会员充值短信确认',
  `app_id` char(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'AppId',
  `app_secret` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'AppSecret',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '商户状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `attachment` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '相关附件',
  `contract_s_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '合同开始时间',
  `contract_e_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '合同结束时间',
  `balance` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '余额',
  `reserve` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '备付金',
  `is_balance_alert` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启积分余额预警1、开启 2、关闭',
  `is_reserve_alert` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启备用金余额预警1、开启 2、关闭',
  `balance_alert_limit` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '余额预警额度',
  `reserve_alert_limit` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '备用金预警额度',
  `sms_balance` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '短信余额条数',
  `sms_alert_phone` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '短信余额预警手机号',
  `sms_alert_limit` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '短信余额预警限制',
  `is_verify` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '认证状态 1已认证',
  `is_third_cashier` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启第三方收银台 1是 2否',
  `third_cashier_user` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '第三方收银台用户地址',
  `third_cashier_order` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方收银台下单地址',
  `third_cashier_refund` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方收银台退款地址',
  `third_cashier_gift_card` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方收银台礼品卡核销地址',
  `third_cashier_member_balance_change` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方收银台用户余额变动地址',
  `money_unit` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '积分单位',
  `commission_tpl` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '佣金模板id',
  `edition` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '版本类型 1专业版 2旗舰版',
  `xcy_domain` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '祥采云域名',
  `is_canteen` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否食堂 1-是 0-否',
  `is_input_number` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否输入工号 1-是 2-否',
  `is_input_name` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否输入姓名 1-是 2-否',
  `is_input_email` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否输入邮箱 1-是 2-否',
  `is_checked_number` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '工号是否必填 1是  0否',
  `is_checked_name` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '姓名是否必填1 是  0否',
  `is_checked_email` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '邮箱是否必填 1是  0否',
  `pay_type` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '支付方式 1-积分支付 2黑金卡支付',
  `channel_sn` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '渠道标记，用于外部接口交互',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `is_balance_recharge_notify` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否开启余额到账通知1、开启 2、关闭',
  `sms_recharge_notify_phone` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '短信余额到账通知手机号',
  `is_input_birth` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否输入生日 1-是 2-否',
  `is_checked_birth` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生日是否必填 1是  0否',
  `is_input_sex` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否输入性别 1-是 2-否',
  `is_checked_sex` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '性别是否必填 1是  0否',
  `is_dg` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否保障下单【1.不保障，2.保障】',
  `is_sync_shop` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否同步门店【1.是，2否】',
  `is_show_department` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否显示部门组织架构【0否 1 是】',
  `is_choose_group` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否选择分组【1.是，2.否】',
  `is_checked_group` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '分组是否必填【1.是，0.否】',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mch_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `open_id` (`openid`),
  UNIQUE KEY `mch_number` (`mch_number`),
  KEY `idx_mch_create_time` (`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_edition` (`edition`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=203 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户表'
show_create.mch_account:
CREATE TABLE `mch_account` (
  `ma_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `role_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '角色id',
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '登陆账户',
  `password` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '登陆密码',
  `ac_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '手机号码',
  `ac_email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '邮箱',
  `name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '姓名',
  `avatar` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '头像',
  `level` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '级别 0管理员 1子账户',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  `pwd_update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '密码修改时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`ma_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `username` (`username`,`delete_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=667 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户账户表'
show_create.mch_account_role:
CREATE TABLE `mch_account_role` (

  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '角色名称',

  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',

  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',

show_create.mch_ads:
CREATE TABLE `mch_ads` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '跳转链接',
  `img_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '图片地址',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '类型 1外链 2大牌卡券 3咨询',
  `coupon_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '大牌卡券id',
  `article_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '文章id',

  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

show_create.mch_app_xcyfx:
CREATE TABLE `mch_app_xcyfx` (

show_create.mch_application:

show_create.mch_application_apply:

show_create.mch_application_info:

show_create.mch_balance_alert:

show_create.mch_balance_change:
CREATE TABLE `mch_balance_change` (
  `mbc_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业ID',
  `operator` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '操作人',
  `business_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '业务id',
  `business_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '业务名称',
  `mode` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '3' COMMENT '类型  1、充值 2、消费',
  `price` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '变动金额',
  `recharge_com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值企业id',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mbc_id`),
  KEY `idx_mbc_mode_time_mchid` (`mode`,`create_time`,`mch_id`)

show_create.mch_black_account:
CREATE TABLE `mch_black_account` (
  `mba_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '账户名称',
  `status` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `is_canteen` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否食堂卡 1-是 2-否',
  `is_barcode` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否展示条形码 1-是 2-否',

  PRIMARY KEY (`mba_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10007 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.mch_black_account_scope:

show_create.mch_black_card_pool:

  `binding_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '绑定时间',

show_create.mch_black_trans:
CREATE TABLE `mch_black_trans` (
  `mbt_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mba_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '黑金账户ID',
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员号',
  `mbr_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员手机号码',
  `trade_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '交易类型编码：1-线上支付、2-线上退款、3-线上充值、4-线上转入、5-线上转出、6-线下消费、7-当日1撤销（退款）、8-退款（次日）、9-后台充值',
  `card_no` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡号',
  `merchant_id` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户号',
  `merchant_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',
  `store_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '门店名称',
  `store_id` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '门店号',
  `price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '操作金额',
  `out_flow_no` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部流水号',
  `inner_flow_no` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '内部流水号',
  `flow` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '流向 1-支出 2-收入',
  `trans_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '交易时间',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mbt_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_orderno` (`trade_type`,`out_flow_no`,`inner_flow_no`),
  KEY `idx_user_card` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`,`card_no`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=111162 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户卡号的交易记录'

  `wx_mchkey` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '1604050569Keying1604050569Keying' COMMENT '微信支付商户key',
  `wx_sslkey` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '/wechatPayCert/apiclient_key.pem' COMMENT '微信支付sslkey',
  `wx_sslcer` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '/wechatPayCert/apiclient_cert.pem' COMMENT '微信支付sslcer',
  `wxmp_appid` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '微信公众号appid',
  `wxmp_appsecret` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '微信公众号appsecret',
  `wxapp_appid` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '微信小程序appid',
  `wxapp_appsecret` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '微信小程序appsecret',
  `wxpay_single_quota` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '微信支付单次限额',
  `wxpay_month_quota` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '微信支付单月限额',
  `wx_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '微信配置状态',
  `wxpay_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '微信支付状态',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `alipay_appid` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '支付宝应用ID',
  `alipay_status` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '支付宝支付状态',
  `alipay_public_key` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '支付宝公钥',
  `alipay_private_key` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '支付宝应用私钥',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `mch_id` (`mch_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=210 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户收银台表'

show_create.mch_coupon:
CREATE TABLE `mch_coupon` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业子租户id 0表示是租户',
  `coupon_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '卡券id',
  `settle_price` decimal(10,3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000' COMMENT '商户结算价',
  `price_rate` decimal(10,4) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000' COMMENT '商户结算费率',
  `sale_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '销售价',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1上架 2下架',
  `e_date` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生效日期',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `sale_limit_amount` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '限额',
  `sale_limit` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '限量',
  `all_limit_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商户品牌总限额',
  `is_show` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否展示 1-展示 2-隐藏',
  `is_sync` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '售价低于面值是否同步 1-同步 2-不同步',
  `sale_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '类型【1.限额，2.手续费】',
  `sale_limit_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '限量类型【1.每个月，2.每天】',
  `sale_limit_ds` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '限量维度【1.用户，2，租户】',
  `sale_limit_hour_before` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00' COMMENT '限购时间点（当前）',
  `sale_limit_hour` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00' COMMENT '限购时间点（之前）',
  `sale_limit_hour_change_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '限购时间点变动时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mch_coupon_mscs` (`mch_id`,`com_id`,`status`,`coupon_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=25259 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户开通卡券表'

show_create.mch_department:

show_create.mch_dingding_message_order:

show_create.mch_dingding_message_task:

show_create.mch_markup:
CREATE TABLE `mch_markup` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `coupon` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '卡券加价比例% 1为1%',
  `ddfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '叮咚分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `hffx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '话费分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `moviefx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '电影分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `mtfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '美团分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `slfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '商旅分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `smfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '山姆分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `stfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '视听分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `supplyfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '供应链分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `tyfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '团油分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `yhfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '永辉分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `hlfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '海旅分销加价比例% 1为1%',
  `zfbhb` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '支付宝红包加价比例% 1为1%',
  `shihangfx` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '食行生鲜加价比例 1为1%',
  `flgfx` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '福利购分销加价比例 1为1%',
  `xcyfx` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户备付金加价配置表'
show_create.mch_markup_coupon:

  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户备付金卡券加价配置表'
show_create.mch_markup_hffx:

show_create.mch_member:
CREATE TABLE `mch_member` (
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mbg_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户会员分组id',
  `user_code` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员员工号',
  `nickname` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '昵称',
  `avatar` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '头像',
  `sex` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '3' COMMENT '性别 1男 2女 3未知',
  `phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '手机号码',
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '邮箱地址',
  `pay_pwd` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '支付密码',
  `way` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '渠道',
  `recharge_total` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '充值总额',
  `fee_total` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '消费总额',
  `current_total` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '当前余额',
  `balance` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '余额',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '会员状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `source` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '注册来源',
  `last_login_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '最近登陆时间',
  `user_token` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部用户token',
  `user_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '用户类型 0-临时 1-正式',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `sign_image` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '签名图片地址',
  `birth` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `employee_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '在职状态 1-在职 2-离职 3-未知',
  `employee_position` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '职位',
  `employee_entry_date` date DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '入职时间',
  `department_id` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `company` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '所属公司',
  `address` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '常驻地址',
  `part_a` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '合同甲方',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mbr_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `mch_id&phone&user_code` (`mch_id`,`phone`,`user_code`),
  UNIQUE KEY `mchid_mbr_number` (`mch_id`,`mbr_number`),
  KEY `idx_mm_time_mchid` (`create_time`,`mch_id`),
  KEY `idx_phone` (`phone`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=270236 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户会员表'

show_create.mch_member_recharge_task:
CREATE TABLE `mch_member_recharge_task` (
  `mmrt_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT ' 企业id',
  `total_count` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值会员数',
  `total_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '充值总额',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '充值类型  1-积分 2-银行转账',
  `task_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '任务状态  1、执行成功 2、 待执行 3、执行中 4、执行失败',
  `result` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '充值结果',
  `external_code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '业务号',
  `identifier` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '纳税人识别号',
  `taxpayer` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '纳税人名称（抬头），分组名称',
  `mbg_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '用户分组ID',
  `remark` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `email` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '申请人邮箱',
  `mobile` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '申请人手机号',
  `applicant_name` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '申请人姓名',
  `is_remit` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否打款 0-否 1-是',
  `fapiao_path` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '发票图片',
  `download_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '下载文件地址',
  `callback_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '回调通知地址',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `batch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '批次名称',
  `applicant_entity` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '申请主体',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mmrt_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=15456 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户会员充值任务表'

show_create.mch_member_recycle:
CREATE TABLE `mch_member_recycle` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `recycle_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '回收编号',
  `recycle_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '需要回收的总金额',
  `recycle_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '1、回收成功 2、回收中 3、回收失败',
  `recycle_number` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '需要回收的会员人数',
  `recycle_success_number` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '回收成功会员人数',
  `recycle_success_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '回收成功总金额',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=870 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户会员余额回收任务表'
show_create.mch_member_recycle_info:

  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '备注',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5706 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户会员余额回收任务明细表'
show_create.mch_member_wxapp_order:

  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户名称',

  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员号',

  `transaction_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '微信支付订单号	',

show_create.mch_message_template:
CREATE TABLE `mch_message_template` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键ID',
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `code` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模板唯一编码，如 POINT_ARRIVAL',
  `img` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '背景图片',
  `content` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模板正文，含 {{占位符}}',
  `placeholders` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '占位符',
  `status` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=停用 1=启用',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_mch_id&code` (`mch_id`,`code`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='消息/推送模板表'
show_create.mch_mtkpfx_order_type:
CREATE TABLE `mch_mtkpfx_order_type` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `order_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '订单id',
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部订单号',
  `order_type` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '订单类型',
  `create_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unq_out_order_sn` (`out_order_sn`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=78849 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='商户美团开票版订单类型表'
show_create.mch_multi_coupon:
CREATE TABLE `mch_multi_coupon` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业子租户id 0表示是租户',
  `multi_coupon_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '组合券id',
  `settle_price` decimal(10,3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000' COMMENT '商户结算价',
  `price_rate` decimal(10,4) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000' COMMENT '商户结算费率',
  `sale_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '销售价',
  `child_coupon_prices` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '子卡券销售价',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1上架 2下架',
  `e_date` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生效日期',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `sale_limit` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '限量',
  `is_show` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否展示 1-展示 2-隐藏',
  `is_sync` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '售价低于面值是否同步 1-同步 2-不同步',
  `sale_limit_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '限量类型【1.每个月，2.每天】',
  `sale_limit_ds` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '限量维度【1.用户，2，租户】',
  `sale_limit_hour_before` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00' COMMENT '限购时间点（当前）',
  `sale_limit_hour` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00' COMMENT '限购时间点（之前）',
  `sale_limit_hour_change_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '限购时间点变动时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mch_id` (`mch_id`,`com_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=61 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户组合券表'
show_create.mch_multi_coupon_price:
CREATE TABLE `mch_multi_coupon_price` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bind_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '组合卡券表id',
  `e_date` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生效日期',
  `status` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1待更新 2已更新',
  `child_coupon_sale_price_old` varchar(4096) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '旧子卡券销售价',
  `child_coupon_sale_price_new` varchar(4096) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '新子卡券销售价',
  `error` varchar(4096) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '错误日志',
  `create_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bind_id` (`bind_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='组合卡券商户销售价设置表'
show_create.mch_payment:
CREATE TABLE `mch_payment` (
  `mp_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `account_no` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户',
  `account_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户名称 ',
  `cdbank_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '开户行名称',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mp_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户付款账户表'
show_create.mch_pick_style:
CREATE TABLE `mch_pick_style` (
  `mps_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `style` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'json样式',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mps_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户自提卡券样式表'
show_create.mch_point_arrival_record:
CREATE TABLE `mch_point_arrival_record` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键ID',
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员id',
  `batch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '批次名称',
  `order_fee` decimal(12,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '充值金额',
  `status` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=未推送 1=已推送',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_search` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`,`status`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4799 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='充值推送记录表'
show_create.mch_recharge_apply:
CREATE TABLE `mch_recharge_apply` (
  `mra_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `op_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '申请人id',
  `admin_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '操作人id',
  `platform` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '充值平台标识',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值类型 1现金 2授信 3自动认款',
  `way` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值途径 1银行转账',
  `order_sn` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '充值订单号',
  `pay_money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '充值金额',
  `attachment` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '附件图片',
  `remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '驳回原因',
  `task_remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '执行结果',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '1充值成功 2待审核 3待充值 4充值失败 5已驳回',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  `up_remark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '充值备注',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mra_id`),
  KEY `idx_mra_time_mchid_status` (`create_time`,`mch_id`,`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1209 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户充值申请表'
show_create.mch_recharge_apply_record:
CREATE TABLE `mch_recharge_apply_record` (
  `mrar_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mra_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值申请id',
