) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户第三方账户表'
show_create.mch_verify:
CREATE TABLE `mch_verify` (
  `mv_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `admin_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `main_verify` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '主体认证',
  `handler` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '业务处理人',
  `business_license` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '营业执照',
  `company_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业名称',
  `company_address` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '企业地址',
  `company_code` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '统一社会信用代码',
  `legal_person` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '法定代表人',
  `id_card_back` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '身份证反面照片',
  `id_card_front` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '身份证正面照片',
  `legal_person_name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '法人姓名',
  `legal_person_idcard` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '法人身份证',
  `legal_person_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '法人手机号码',
  `attachment` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '上传附件',
  `is_audit` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '审核状态 1通过 2待审核 3拒绝',
  `reason` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '审核备注',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mv_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='商户认证表'
show_create.mch_voucher:
CREATE TABLE `mch_voucher` (
  `mv_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mvb_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '批次ID',
  `voucher_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '券号',
  `voucher_secret` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '积分券密码',
  `money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '券面额',
  `left_money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '剩余金额',
  `recycle_money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '回收金额',
  `start_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '有效期开始时间',
  `end_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '有效期结束时间',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '10' COMMENT '状态  10-启用 20-禁用 30-已回收',
  `is_manual_forbid` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否手动禁用',
  `use_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '10' COMMENT '权益使用状态 10-待领取 20-已领取 30-已过期 40-已回收 ',
  `ocr_status` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '3' COMMENT 'ocr审核状态 0-待审核 1-审核通过 2-审核失败 3-无需审核',
  `ocr_fail_num` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'ocr审核失败次数',
  `ocr_fail_image` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'ocr审核失败图片',
  `ocr_restart_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '重审时间',
  `use_scope_application` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '使用范围（应用场景）1全部 ，2指定视听',
  `aid` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '应用id',
  `use_scope_coupon` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '使用范围（大牌卡券）1全部 ，2指定卡券',
  `cid` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡券id',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '绑定会员ID',
  `mvbm_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '指定会员id',
  `mbr_number` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '工号',
  `phone` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '会员手机',
  `is_pop` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否弹窗  0-未弹窗 1-已弹窗 2-无需弹窗',
  `need_electronic_signature` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否需要用户签名  0-不需要 1-需要签名',
  `electronic_signature` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '电子签名',
  `receive_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '领取时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '修改时间',
  `out_mch_ids` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '祥采云商户号，逗号分隔',
  `is_notify` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否弹窗  0-未通知 1-已通知 2-无需通知',
  `exclusive_ids` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '活动id',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mv_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `card_no_unique` (`voucher_sn`),
  KEY `idx_terminal` (`status`,`use_status`,`is_pop`,`start_time`,`end_time`),
  KEY `idx_mchid_mbrid` (`mch_id`,`mbr_id`,`status`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=135175 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='积分券表'
show_create.mch_voucher_auto_log:
CREATE TABLE `mch_voucher_auto_log` (
  `mval_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `mvb_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '批次ID',
  `mv_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '权益ID',
  `mbr_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '会员ID',
  `send_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '3' COMMENT '类型  3、生日 4、入职',
  `mark` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '唯一标志，防止自动发放重复 例如年份',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mval_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `mvb_mbr_unique` (`mvb_id`,`mbr_id`,`mark`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=23203 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='积分券自动方法日志表'
show_create.mch_voucher_batch:
CREATE TABLE `mch_voucher_batch` (
  `mvb_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业ID',
  `batch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '批次名称',
  `contact_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '联系人姓名',
  `contact_phone` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '联系人手机',
  `union_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '发放单位',
  `batch_intro` varchar(512) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '权益说明',
  `bg_img` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '首页弹窗图',
  `voucher_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '券类型 0-提货券 1-实体券',
  `money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '券面额',
  `total_money` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '总金额',
  `send_num` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '发放数量',
  `start_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '开始日期',
  `end_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '结束日期',
  `use_scope_application` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '使用范围（应用场景）1全部 ，2指定视听',
  `aid` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '应用id',
  `use_scope_coupon` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '使用范围（大牌卡券）1全部 ，2指定卡券',
  `cid` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡券id',
  `pop_path` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '弹窗页面路径',
  `use_path` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '去使用页面路径',
  `is_send` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否发放（1-已发放）',
  `need_electronic_signature` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否需要用户签名  0-不需要 1-需要签名',
  `is_ocr_check` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否启用ocr审核  0-不启用 1-启用',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '10' COMMENT '状态（10-启用 20-禁用 30-已回收）',
  `audit_state` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '10' COMMENT '审核状态：10-待审核 20-审核通过 30-驳回',
  `audit_desc` varchar(512) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '审核备注',
  `audit_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '审核时间',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '修改时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  `is_send_sms` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否发需要短信通知   1-需要 2-不需要',
  `is_send_email` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否发需要邮件通知  1-需要 2-不需要',
  `is_send_work_message` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否发需要短信通知  1-需要 2-不需要',
  `is_send_dingding_message` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否需要钉钉通知   1-需要 2-不需要',
  `is_send_expiring_soon_sms` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否需要临期短信通知   1-需要 2-不需要',
  `is_send_expiring_soon_dingding_message` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否需要临期钉钉通知   1-需要 2-不需要',
  `expiring_soon_notice_days` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '临期通知天数',
  `send_type` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '发放方式 1统一充值 ，2自动充值， 3生日充值 ，4入职充值',
  `out_mch_ids` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '祥采云商户号，逗号分隔',
  `exclusive_ids` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '活动id',
  `choose_member_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '充值会员范围  0-默认无 1-会员导入 2-全部会员 3-指定会员',
  `choose_member_ids` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '选中的会员',
  `choose_member_contain_resign` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否包含离职人员  0-默认 1-包含 2-不包含',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mvb_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=11347 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='积分券批次表'
show_create.mch_voucher_batch_member:

show_create.mch_voucher_change:

show_create.mch_voucher_ocr_log:

show_create.mch_work_message_order:
CREATE TABLE `mch_work_message_order` (

  `mch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',

show_create.mch_work_message_task:

show_create.mch_work_message_template:

show_create.mch_wxapp:

show_create.member_active_static:
CREATE TABLE `member_active_static` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` char(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '日期',
  `active` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '活跃数-手机号唯一',
  `total` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '总数-手机号唯一',
  `create_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '统计时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_date` (`date`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=272 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='会员日活统计'
show_create.new_location:
CREATE TABLE `new_location` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `province_id` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '关联province表的id',
  `city_id` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '关联city表的id',
  `area_id` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '关联area表的id',
  `name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '地区名称',
  `show_select` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否在前端可选',
  `sorts` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `is_zhixia` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否是直辖市  1是  0不是',
  `initials` char(1) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '地区名称拼音首字母',
  `province_name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联province表的name',
  `city_name` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联city表的name',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_area_id` (`area_id`),
  KEY `idx_province_id` (`province_id`),
  KEY `idx_city_id` (`city_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3556 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.operation_log:
CREATE TABLE `operation_log` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '租户id',
  `mch_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '租户名称',
  `module` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '模块（如 manage）',
  `page` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '页面名称或路由',
  `action` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '操作类型（手动指定）',
  `admin_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '用户ID',
  `user_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '用户名称',
  `before_data` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '变更前数据(JSON)',
  `after_data` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '变更后数据(JSON)',
  `content` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '信息',
  `ip` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'IP地址',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=38 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='操作日志'
show_create.order_combine:
CREATE TABLE `order_combine` (
  `order_id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `mch_id` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `mch_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mbr_id` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mbr_phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `nickname` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `out_order_sn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `flow_no` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '',
  `app_module` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_source` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `brand_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `brand_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `face_value` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `price` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `num` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `cost_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `fee_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `channel_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `discount_price` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `actual_pay_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `refund_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `order_status` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `refund_status` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `order_time` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `refund_time` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `pay_time` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `settlement_rate` decimal(10,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `settlement_price` decimal(10,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `settlement_type` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `group_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_fee_mch` decimal(10,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `refund_fee_mch` decimal(10,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `trade_amount` decimal(12,2) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `create_time` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `update_time` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `order_type` int unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`order_id`,`app_module`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unq_order_sn` (`order_sn`),
  KEY `idx_mbr_phone` (`mbr_phone`),
  KEY `idx_app_module` (`app_module`),
  KEY `idx_mch_id` (`mch_id`),
  KEY `idx_order_status` (`order_status`),
  KEY `idx_out_order_sn` (`out_order_sn`),
  KEY `idx_pay_time` (`pay_time`),
  KEY `idx_order_sn` (`order_sn`),
  KEY `idx_refund_time` (`refund_time`),
  KEY `idx_mbr_id` (`mbr_id`),
  KEY `idx_order_time` (`order_time`),
  KEY `idx_refund_status` (`refund_status`),
  KEY `idx_oc_status_time_module` (`order_status`,`create_time`,`app_module`),
  KEY `idx_oc_status_time_mchid` (`order_status`,`create_time`,`mch_id`),
  KEY `idx_order_combine_module_time` (`app_module`,`create_time`,`order_status`),
  KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time` DESC)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci
show_create.partner_admin:
CREATE TABLE `partner_admin` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '用户名',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '合伙人姓名',
  `partner_no` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '合伙人ID',
  `password` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '密码',
  `pay_pwd` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '支付密码',
  `phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '手机号码',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '类型 1公司 2个人',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `手机号` (`phone`,`delete_time`),
  UNIQUE KEY `用户名` (`username`,`delete_time`),
  UNIQUE KEY `合伙人号` (`partner_no`,`delete_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='合伙人账户表'
show_create.partner_receiving_account:
CREATE TABLE `partner_receiving_account` (
  `mp_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `p_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `account_no` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户',
  `account_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户名称 ',
  `cdbank_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '开户行名称',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mp_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='合伙人收款账户表'
show_create.partner_tax:
CREATE TABLE `partner_tax` (
  `mp_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `p_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `tax_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '税号',
  `compony_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '公司名称',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1启用 2禁用',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`mp_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='合伙人收款账户表'
show_create.partner_withdrawal:
CREATE TABLE `partner_withdrawal` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `p_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '合伙人id',
  `withdrawal_sn` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '提现编号',
  `reason` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '驳回理由',
  `withdrawal_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '提现状态 1审核中 2发放中 3审核失败 4发放成功',
  `withdrawal_amount` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '提现金额',
  `payment_sn` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '打款流水号',
  `account_no` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户',
  `account_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '银行账户名称 ',
  `cdbank_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '开户行名称',
  `disbursement_proof` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '放款凭证',
  `invoice_proof` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '开票凭证',
  `tax_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '税号',
  `compony_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '公司名称',
  `tax_p` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '扣税比例 1为1%',
  `tax` decimal(10,2) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '扣税金额',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='合伙人提现记录'
show_create.shop_agent:
CREATE TABLE `shop_agent` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `third_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '1 瑞祥',
  `group_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '食堂商户分组',
  `type` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '名称',
  `province_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '省id',
  `area_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '区域id',
  `city_id` int unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `lat` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '',
  `lng` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '',
  `address` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '地址',
  `tel` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '电话',
  `special_logo` varchar(180) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '特约商户LOGO',
  `cate_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商户分类id',
  `cate` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商户分类',
  `show_special` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否显示在特约商户【1.展示，0.不展示】',
  `md_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '瑞祥门店号',
  `term_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '瑞祥默认终端号（商户宝）',
  `is_th_open` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `is_th_shop` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `dynamic_voucher_switch` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `pay_code` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `show_pick` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT 'Y',
  `status` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1.启用，2.禁用  （SWITCH_STATUS）',
  `create_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_province_id` (`province_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_create_time` (`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_group_id` (`group_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_status` (`status`),
  KEY `id` (`id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_cate_id` (`cate_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_name` (`name`(191)),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_area_id` (`area_id`),
  KEY `idx_shop_agent_city_id` (`city_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.shop_agent_cate:
CREATE TABLE `shop_agent_cate` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `icon` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `create_time` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `update_time` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_del` int DEFAULT '0',
  `sorts` int DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.shop_agent_group:
CREATE TABLE `shop_agent_group` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商户分组名称',
  `mch_thnew_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '新提货商户号（Thpay用）',
  `is_del` int unsigned DEFAULT '0',
  `create_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `thq_mchbrand` int unsigned DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '提货券品牌',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9219 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='门店分组'
show_create.shop_agent_mch:
CREATE TABLE `shop_agent_mch` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT '租户id',
  `shop_agent_id` int unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT '门店id',
  `status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '状态 1-启用 2-禁用',
  `settlement_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '结算方式1.手续费类、2.折扣比例',
  `fee_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '手续费比例',
  `channel_fee_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '通道手续费比例',
  `discount_rate` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT '折扣比例',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mid_aid` (`mch_id`,`shop_agent_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=247073 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='租户门店'
show_create.system_attachment:
CREATE TABLE `system_attachment` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键',
  `file_name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '文件名称',
  `path` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '相对路径',
  `type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '文件类型 1图片',
  `size` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '文件大小(字节)',
  `suffix` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '文件后缀',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=36240 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='附件表'
show_create.system_config:
CREATE TABLE `system_config` (
  `config_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `parent_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '父级id',
  `config_key` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '配置字段名',
  `config_type` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '配置类型',
  `config_rule` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '配置规则',
  `config_title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '配置标题名称',
  `config_value` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT '配置值',
  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`config_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=13 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='系统配置表'
show_create.system_log:
CREATE TABLE `system_log` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `ip` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'IP地址',
  `url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '请求地址',
  `header` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '请求头',
  `method` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '请求方式',
  `params` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '请求信息',
  `response` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '响应数据',
  `status_code` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'HTTP状态码',
  `start_time` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '开始时间毫秒',
  `end_time` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '结束时间毫秒',
  `spend_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '耗时毫秒',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_url` (`url`,`create_time`),
  KEY `idx_ip` (`ip`,`create_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=22 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='系统请求日志表'
show_create.system_module:
CREATE TABLE `system_module` (
  `module_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `edition` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '版本类型 0无 1专业版 2旗舰版',
  `platform` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '平台标识',
  `parent_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '父级id',
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模块标题',
  `type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模块分类',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模块别名',
  `icon` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '模块图标',
  `path` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '路径',
  `redirect` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '重定向',
  `component` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '组件视图',
  `sort` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '排序',
  `hidden` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否隐藏菜单',
  `hidden_bread` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT '是否隐藏面包屑',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`module_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1856 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='系统模块表'
show_create.system_router:
CREATE TABLE `system_router` (
  `router_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `module_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '模块id',
  `code` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标识',
  `url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Api地址',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`router_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='系统路由表'
show_create.tb_merchant_contract:
CREATE TABLE `tb_merchant_contract` (
  `merchant_code` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '商户号',
  `merchant_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商户名称',
  `merchant_state` varchar(1) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商户状态 1有效',
  `contract_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '合同id',
  `rule_no` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算规则号',
  `contract_start_date` varchar(8) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '合同开始时间',
  `contract_end_date` varchar(8) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '合同结束时间',
  `cacl_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '结算费率 百分比',
  `rule_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结算周期',
  PRIMARY KEY (`merchant_code`,`cacl_name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.thirdparty:
CREATE TABLE `thirdparty` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方名称',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '第三方别名',
  `md_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '瑞祥门店号',
  `term_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '瑞祥默认终端号（商户宝）',
  `merchant_code` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '提货券商户号',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建时间',
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '更新时间',
  `deleted_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '删除时间',
  `is_show` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否前端可见 0 否 1 是',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=7 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='第三方表'
show_create.thq_zone_mchbrand:
CREATE TABLE `thq_zone_mchbrand` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '品牌名称',
  `image_url` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '品牌logo',
  `create_time` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '修改时间',
  `is_delete` tinyint unsigned DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '是否删除 1 否 0 是 默认1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=285 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='提货专区商户品牌'
show_create.upload_mch_black_card_pool:
CREATE TABLE `upload_mch_black_card_pool` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `mch_black_account_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '黑金账户ID',
  `block_number` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '批次号',
  `card_no` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡号',
  `pass` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '密码',
  `cvv` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'cvv',
  `card_id` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '卡芯片ID',
  `phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '手机号',
  `create_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `update_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '更新时间',
  `delete_time` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4782 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC
show_create.upload_mch_member:
CREATE TABLE `upload_mch_member` (
  `umm_id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `mch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '商户id',
  `block_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '上传编号',
  `mbr_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '员工号',
  `nickname` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '昵称',
  `sex` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '3' COMMENT '性别',
  `phone` varchar(15) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '手机号码',
  `mbg_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '分组id',
  `create_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间',
  `delete_time` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '删除时间',
  `user_code` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '外部会员id',
  `user_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '用户类型 0-临时 1-正式',
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '邮箱',
  `birth` date DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '生日',
  `employee_position` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '职位',
  `employee_entry_date` date DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '入职时间',
  `department_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '部门 id',
  `com_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '企业id',
  `company` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '所属公司',
  `address` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '常住地址',
  `part_a` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT '' COMMENT '合同甲方',
  PRIMARY KEY (`umm_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=197081 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC COMMENT='上传商户会员表'

show_create.upload_mch_voucher_batch_member:

FUNCTION.order_status_text:
CREATE FUNCTION `order_status_text`( order_status int(1)) RETURNS varchar(10) CHARSET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci
BEGIN
  #Routine body goes here...
RETURN case order_status when 1 then '订单完成' when 2 then '已创建' when 3 then '已支付' when 4 then '订单失败' when 5 then '已取消' when 6 then '已退款' end;
END
